# Fixture

> A tiny site for golden-file tests.

All content is also machine-readable JSON under https://fixture.test/api/ (site.json, <collection>/index.json, <collection>/<slug>.json).

## Pages

- [About](https://fixture.test/about/)
- [Home](https://fixture.test/): The fixture home page.

## Blog

- [Second post](https://fixture.test/blog/second-post/): The second fixture post.
- [First post](https://fixture.test/blog/first-post/): The first fixture post.
